instruction: Create a web scraper in Python that downloads a list of news articles. The script should take a URL as an input and produce a list of articles from that page. Each article should have the URL, title, author and publication date.
output:
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

url = "https://www.nytimes.com/"

html_content = requests.get(url).text

soup = BeautifulSoup(html_content, "lxml")

news_Section = soup.find("div", class_="css-1qwxefa esl82me1")

articles = news_Section.find_all("h2", class_="e1xfvim30")

news_list = []

for article in articles:
    title = article.find("a").text

    author = article.find("span", class_="css-1n7hynb").text
    
    date = article.find("time").text
    
    link = article.find("a")["href"]
    
    news_dict = {
        "title": title,
        "author": author,
        "date": date,
        "link": link
    }
    
    news_list.append(news_dict)

print(news_list)
